steps.title: Identify the inference
steps.content: The first sentence says natural selection was an obvious next step given ideas already circulating among British scientists. The next sentence draws a logical consequence: Darwin and Wallace reaching the idea independently may not have been accidental.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: A signals contrast, but the second sentence follows from the first. C adds a separate point rather than drawing a consequence. D would introduce an example, but the sentence states an inference. The answer is B.
